HTF Liquidity produces correct pool counts and field-level matches on H1 (3 pools), H4 (1 pool), D1/W1 (0 pools). OTE produces 44 zones with correct fib levels and kill zone gating (16 actionable in LOKZ/NYOKZ, 28 non-actionable).
